raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A small yellow object with a pink top is on a green surface. The object is rigid and has a distinct shape. STRATEGY - Reach the object, grasp it, and transport it to a new location. Failure modes include missing the object or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the object body; Step 2 grasp the object for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the destination.**
Goal: any_in(yellow_object, target_location)
Scene: yellow_object, green_surface
Step 1: reach(yellow_object)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow object
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_object, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_object) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_object)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow object
  contact: holding(yellow_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_object)
Step 3: transport(yellow_object -> target_location)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the target_location
  spatial: above(yellow_object, target_location, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_object)
  done_when: above(yellow_object, target_location, 0.05)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow object
the body of the yellow object
an empty area on the target_location
